title: Luxury & Fashion Avenue
description: Fashion Avenue is the region's definitive luxury precinct—where global maisons, private clienteling, and architectural prestige create an environment competitors cannot replicate.

hero.title: Where luxury lives at scale
hero.description: Double-height boutiques, curated adjacencies, and tourism density that luxury groups demand for Middle East flagship strategies.

items.title: Global Maisons
items.description: Concentration of international luxury houses with flagship formats, limited editions, and appointment-led retail.

items.title: High Jewellery & Watches
items.description: Secure, high-visibility corridors for timepieces and jewellery with concierge adjacency.

items.title: Concierge & Services
items.description: Premium services layer that extends dwell time and supports VIP tourism segments.

items.title: Private Shopping
items.description: Invitation-only suites and after-hours formats for top client segments.
